description: KB restructured: superset‚Üíregistry, 00-03‚Üídoctrine (survivors only), 04_value_layer‚Üíinstances, 05_reference‚Üíreference, session files‚Üídesign. Eliminated ~25 empty scaffold files.

registry/‚Üísuperset/. Superset is a slice category over the industry base layer. The name was always in ontology.json title ('mo:os Superset Ontology v3'). Restored to match the categorical concept: ùìû_Superset classifies industry (ùìò) into typed mo:os objects.

OBJ14-21 added: PlatformConfig, WorkstationConfig, Preference, Provider, BenchmarkSuite, BenchmarkTask, BenchmarkScore, AgentSpec. Added mutable and allowed_strata fields to all 21 objects (removes hardcoded logic in loader.go). Added broad_categories SUB09 platform, SUB10 config. Schema updated with mutable (boolean) and allowed_strata (enum array). CSV regenerated.

7-phase KB curation complete. Phase 1: registry/‚Üísuperset/. Phase 2: ontology expanded to 21 objects with mutable+allowed_strata. Phase 3: industry layer (7 JSON files ‚Äî providers, protocols, tools, frameworks, compute, features, schema). Phase 4: instance fixes (stale paths platform/kernel/, schema_version‚Üí3.0) + new tools.json, agents.json. Phase 5: doctrine/install.md (11-Program boot spec). Phase 6: doctrine/concepts.md (11 formal concept definitions). Phase 7: design/concept-instance-map.md (21-row object-to-instance traceability matrix).
